title: Crispy Venezuelan Pudding Bites
description: A dessert inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, with crispy bites filled with creamy pudding.
instructions: Prepare the pudding mix according to package instructions.
Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
Add the sugar to the melted butter and stir until dissolved.
Combine the pudding mixture with the sugar and butter mixture.
Scoop the mixture into small balls and place on a baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
